fields.description: PRELIMINARIES : Mobilization, Demobilization, Site facilities - office & Store etc. Supply of Power and Water during construction.

Secant Pile , As Shown in the Drawings Sec CC & FF

Boundary wall

Traffic diversion

"TEMPORARY HOARDING AS PER AUTHORITY/DEVELOPER
FOR GAS
TANK FARM SITE AREA
i) HOARDING HEIGHT AND LENGTH = 2.2 X 85 METERS
(CONSIDER THE APPROPRIATE SIZE OF THE OF THE
CONCRETE BLOCK/BASE FOR HOARDING SUPPORT
CONSIDERING THE STRUCTURAL STABILITY TO WITHSTAND
DURING CHALLENGING WEATHER CONDITIONS, THE 2.2
METER- HOARDING WILL FEATURE COVERING GRAPHICS
AND THE DESIGN OF THE GRAPHICS WILL BE PROVIDED
LBCG ACCORDING TO THE EMAAR REQUIREMENT)
TEMPORARY GATE 6M WIDE EACH (EXIT AND ENTRY) FOR
GAS TANK FARM SITE AREA.
A. SIGN BOARD (1 NOS) ON A METAL, THE SIGNBOARD IS OF
SUFFICIENT SIZE TO ALLOW VISIBILITY FROM A DISTANCE,
WITH CLEAR AND LEGIBLE TEXT. (6MX 3M)
B. FOUNDATION AND MOUNTING:
THE SIGNBOARD SHOULD BE MOUNTED ON A SOLID
FOUNDATION WITH ADEQUATE SUPPORT TO PREVENT IT
FROM TOPPLING OVER, ESPECIALLY CONSIDERING WIND
LOAD.
C. INSTALLATION OF MESH FOR SUNLIGHT PROTECTION.
D. ADDITIONAL PORTABLE LIGHTING SYSTEM FOR NIGHT
ACTIVITIES

METERS)

FOR ENTRY AND EXIT (HEIGHT-2.2 METER X LENGTH - 12
METER)"

LOAD.

STREET AND ONE TOWARDS FINANCIAL CENTER ROAD"

"SITE MOBILIZATION - LAYDOWN AREA PLOT GRADING,
LAYDOWN AREA FENCING AND GATE INSTALLATION.
A. PROVIDE THE REQUIRED GRADING LEVEL AND SLOPE
ENSURE PROPER GRADING TO PREVENT WATER
ACCUMULATION IN THE LAYDOWN AREA, THE AREA
SHOULD BE SLOPED APPROPRIATELY
TO DIRECT WATER AWAY TO THE NEAREST DRAINAGE
POINT, INCLUDE THE INSTALLATION OF TEMPORARY
DRAINAGE CHANNELS IF REQUIRED.
SHIFTING, INSTALLATION AND MAINTENANCE OF OFFICE
CABINS, PORTACABINS FOR LBCG STAFF AND
SUBCONTRACTOR, ALL WELFARE FACILITIES-TOLIET,
ELECTRICAL CONNECTIONS, PLUMBING, DRINKING WATER
FACILITY, WASTE MANAGEMENT, SAFETY BARRICADES,
SIGN BOARDS, PPE ETC TILL THE COMPLETION OF
PROJECT.
A. CONTRACTOR SHALL SPECIFY THE SIZE AND SHALL
PROVIDE RATES PER PORTA CABIN WITH SIZE DETAILS
SEPARATELY FOR OFFICE
CABINS, AND CABINS FOR LBCG STAFFS AND SUB
CONTRACTOR
B) INSTALL, SHIFT, AND MAINTAIN PORTA CABINS
THROUGHOUT THE PROJECT, ENSURING PROPER
LEVELING, ANCHORING, HVAC, AND ELECTRICAL
FUNCTIONALITY, INSTALL TOILETS WITH PLUMBING,
PROVIDE SAFE ELECTRICAL CONNECTIONS, POTABLE
WATER SUPPLY, AND
MAINTAIN CLEANLINESS, SUPPLY WASTE BINS, AND
ENSURE REGULAR COLLECTION/DISPOSAL"

i) LARGE 5 METER * 1,METER * 1METER
ii) SMALL 1 METER * 1 METER * 1METER"

"A. REMOVAL LOADING / TRANSPORTATION FOR WASHED
SAND LBCG STORE YARD IN JABAL ALI AND UNLOADING :
REMOVAL OF WASHED SAND BY MANUALLY/ MACHINE

"WASHED SAND TRANSPORT FROM JABAL ALI LBCG STORE

"NEW MATERIAL WASHED SAND SHALL BE USED IF LOSS

MATCH WITH EXISTING
BACKFILLING MATERIAL , NO HARD , SHARP STONES"

"REMOVAL OF GRANITE TILE CLADDING FOR THE

CHAMBER IN GAS TANK
FARM, INSIDE AND OUTSIDE

"EXISTING WELDED WIRE MESH FENCING REPAIR AND
REINSTATEMENT.

"NON DESTRUCTIVE TESTS REQUIRED FOR CHECKING THE

"RECTIFICATION / FOUNDATIONS FOR GAS TANKS IF

RESULTS./CASTING NEW FOUNDATION"

CASTING NEW PIPE SUPPORT FOUNDATION AS FOLLOWING
IF REQUIRE

SUPPORTS IS 250 MMX 250 MM, THE FOUNDATION FOR THE
PIPE SUPPORTS
SHALL BE MINIMUM 300X 300 WITH DEPTH OF 300MM
TOTAL PIPE SUPPORT COUNT : 26
HEADER SUPPORT : 8
BRANCH PIPELINE SUPPORT: 8
MAIN SUPPORT TOWARDS PRS'S: 1
DECANTING PIPELINE SUPPORT:9"

MAINTENANCE WORKS INCLUDING ACCESS LADDER,
SAFETY
HANDRAILS AND WALKING PLATFORM, CONSIDERING
